description: `select_related('author')` removed — accessing p.author in the comprehension fires one query per post.
diff:
diff --git a/posts.py b/posts.py
--- a/posts.py
+++ b/posts.py
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 def get_posts_with_authors(post_ids):
-    posts = Post.objects.filter(id__in=post_ids).select_related("author")
+    posts = Post.objects.filter(id__in=post_ids)
     return [(p.title, p.author.name) for p in posts]
